# Security Policy

## Supported Versions

Security fixes are applied to the latest version deployed from the `main` branch.

| Version         | Supported |
| --------------- | --------- |
| Latest `main`   | Yes       |
| Older revisions | No        |

## Reporting a Vulnerability

Please do not open a public issue for suspected security vulnerabilities.

Report vulnerabilities privately by email at
[arturbakhtygereyev@gmail.com](mailto:arturbakhtygereyev@gmail.com).

Please include:

- a clear description of the vulnerability;
- the affected URL or file;
- steps to reproduce the issue;
- the potential impact;
- a suggested fix, if available.

You can expect an acknowledgement within 72 hours. If the vulnerability is
confirmed, I will work on a fix and coordinate disclosure after it is resolved.
